response.overview: It is Easter weekend, and timid, 18-year-old, private school student Charlie is invited to a party by his juvenile peers. A wild night culminates in the disappearance of the most popular girl at school. However, Charlie was the last to see her. The next day, Charlie receives a cryptic message from the girl, leading him down a reality-bending path that forces him to confront his own vices to attain what he truly desires.
response.title: Revelations
